title: Fruit Club
description: Explore fun by placing the fruit tiles in the correct place. Fruit Club is a fun and puzzle tiles matching game. Player has to place the fruit tiles in the correct place. Use your brain to solve the tiles position and win the game. Be Careful! Wrong placement of tiles leading to over the game. If you like genres such as tiles matching games, puzzle games or just want to have a good time then this game is for you. Features of this game: High Quality graphics will leave only positive feedback Game size is minimal (but not compromised the graphics) and it is good for your device health Super simple controls make it easy to play.
instructions: How to play Android Use On-Screen touch PC Use Mouse Left Click
